name: rec
description: Local, DOM-based browser session replay for agent-driven sessions.

scripts.build: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/daemon/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/demo/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/player/tsconfig.json && cd packages/player && ./node_modules/.bin/vite build
scripts.check: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/daemon/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/demo/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/player/tsconfig.json --noEmit
